nodes.name: Sub-Workflow Input
nodes.notes: Receives: system_prompt, user_prompt, model (gemini-free|sonnet|opus), workflow_name, client_name, purpose. Default: gemini-free

nodes.name: Which Provider?
nodes.notes: Routes to Google Gemini (free) or Anthropic Claude (paid)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ system_instruction: { parts: [{ text: $json.system_prompt }] }, contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.user_prompt }] }], generationConfig: { maxOutputTokens: $json.max_tokens, temperature: 0.7 } }) }}

nodes.name: Gemini API Call (FREE)
nodes.notes: Google Gemini API — FREE tier: 15 RPM / 1M tokens/day for Flash, 5 RPM for Pro. Get key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model_id, max_tokens: $json.max_tokens, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude API Call (PAID)
nodes.notes: Only used for high-value tasks: forecast review, proposals, newsletters

parameters.jsCode:
// Merge outputs from either provider into unified format
return $input.all();

nodes.name: Return Response
nodes.notes: Returns: content, parsed_content, model, provider, token counts, costs
